overall.description: The video begins with a first-person exploration of a detailed spaceship cockpit interior with artificial lighting and mechanical structures. It then transitions to third-person gameplay showing a character in a spacesuit walking along a rocky ridge overlooking a vast industrial settlement on a hazy alien planet identified as Gagarin Landing.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view inside a spaceship cockpit. The camera pans around the enclosed space, revealing metal structural frames, floor grating, yellow support beams, and control panels. The lighting is artificial and dim, with an illuminated doorway visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook above industrial mining settlement on hazy alien planet

events.description: hard cut transition from spaceship interior to third-person view on rocky alien planet surface
character begins walking along the rocky ridge after initially standing still

agents.ego_description: walking along the reddish rocky ridge, surveying the industrial settlement in the valley below

entered.detail: reddish-brown rocky ground with rough uneven surface
extensive complex of industrial buildings, towers, and processing facilities
multi-level industrial structure with metal walkways and platforms
tall spires and communication towers rising above the settlement
cylindrical storage silos with connected piping systems

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character in a spacesuit standing on a rocky ridge overlooking a vast industrial settlement. The character begins walking along the ridge, revealing more of the hazy alien landscape and the sprawling industrial complex below, including processing plants, silos, and tall towers. The atmosphere is dusty and desaturated, with the location identified as Gagarin Landing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from the claustrophobic interior of a spaceship to a sweeping vista of a desolate alien colony. It begins with a first-person pan through a dim cockpit, moving past metal structural frames, floor grating, and yellow support beams toward an illuminated doorway. As the camera passes through the threshold, the perspective shifts to a third-person view of a character in a spacesuit standing atop a rocky ridge. The scene then expands to reveal the sprawling industrial complex of Gagarin Landing below, characterized by processing plants, silos, and tall towers. Finally, the camera follows the character as they walk along the ridge, uncovering more of the dusty, desaturated landscape under a hazy sky.
